css/.global.css: Core aesthetic: Typography, high-contrast colors, grid background
css/.components.css: Modular styles for cards, sidebar, and layout containers

js/.core.js: Global entry point and DOM initialization
js/.animations.js: Intersection Observers for scroll reveals and transitions

assets/.fonts/: Self-hosted local copies of Inter and JetBrains Mono
assets/.img/: Project thumbnails, headshots, and high-res stills

data/.projects.json: Centralized JSON store for all Math and Media case studies
data/.stats_models/: Raw data files for interactive logic projects

developer_notes: Separation of Concerns: Keeps statistics logic separate from broadcasting assets.
Scalability: Update projects.json to add content without touching HTML.
Performance: Self-hosted fonts ensure high-quality UI/UX and faster load times.
